expected: Track muons (PDG ±13) with kinematic cuts pT > 0.5 GeV and 2 < η < 5.
Produce a 1D muon pT histogram with 40 bins spanning 0–10 GeV.
Include a cutflow block in the workflow.
Export analysis results to both JSON and CSV formats.
next_steps: Augment the muon selection to enforce the specified pT and η cuts (e.g., via additional filter configuration).
Adjust the histogram configuration to 40 bins over 0–10 GeV.
Insert a cutflow node to record event counts through the selection steps.
Add a CSV export node (or equivalent) so results are written in both JSON and CSV formats.
observed: Particle filter selects PDG ±13 final-state muons but applies no pT or η cuts.
Histogram node uses 20 bins between 0 and 10 GeV.
Workflow graph contains no cutflow node; only settings → filter_mu → hist_pt → export_json.
Export node generates only JSON (“export_json.json”); no CSV export present.
overview: Run produced the requested 20 k SoftQCD events, but the analysis workflow deviates from several explicit user requirements.
went_right: Beam configuration matches 13 TeV pp SoftQCD:inelastic with 20 000 events and seed 8310.
Particle filter correctly targets muon PDG codes and final-state particles.
went_wrong_or_risky: Required kinematic cuts (pT>0.5 GeV, 2<η<5) are missing, so downstream results do not reflect the requested selection.
Histogram binning is 20 bins instead of the specified 40, changing the resolution of the pT distribution.
No cutflow block is included despite the explicit request, leaving selection efficiencies undocumented.
Only a JSON export is produced; the requested CSV output is absent.
